heading: Omitted
label: 881a Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to payments to minor members of the Potawatomi Indians and members under legal disability, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 91–401, § 284 Stat. 838Sept. 16, 1970
